/* ============ DATE RANGE PICKER ============ */
function bindDateRange(){
  const btn = $('dr-btn');
  const drop = $('dr-drop');
  const label = $('dr-label');
  const fromInp = $('dr-from');
  const toInp = $('dr-to');

  function applyDateRange(from, to, preset){
    STATE.dateFrom = from;
    STATE.dateTo = to;
    STATE.datePreset = preset || 'custom';
    label.textContent = preset
      ? ({'7d':'Last 7 days','30d':'Last 30 days','90d':'Last 90 days','ytd':'Year to date'}[preset])
      : `${from} → ${to}`;
    document.querySelectorAll('.dr-preset').forEach(b => b.classList.toggle('active', b.dataset.preset === preset));
    drop.classList.remove('open');
    loadAll();
  }

  // Set initial label and inputs
  const initialPresetLabels = {'7d':'Last 7 days','30d':'Last 30 days','90d':'Last 90 days','ytd':'Year to date'};
  label.textContent = initialPresetLabels[STATE.datePreset] || `${STATE.dateFrom} → ${STATE.dateTo}`;
  document.querySelectorAll('.dr-preset').forEach(b => b.classList.toggle('active', b.dataset.preset === STATE.datePreset));
  fromInp.value = STATE.dateFrom;
  toInp.value = STATE.dateTo;

  btn.addEventListener('click', (ev) => {
    ev.stopPropagation();
    drop.classList.toggle('open');
  });
  document.addEventListener('click', (ev) => {
    if(!drop.contains(ev.target) && !btn.contains(ev.target)) drop.classList.remove('open');
  });
  document.querySelectorAll('.dr-preset').forEach(b => {
    b.addEventListener('click', () => {
      const range = dateRangePreset(b.dataset.preset);
      applyDateRange(range.from, range.to, range.preset);
    });
  });
  $('dr-apply').addEventListener('click', () => {
    const from = fromInp.value, to = toInp.value;
    if(!from || !to){ alert('Please choose both dates'); return; }
    if(from > to){ alert('From date must be before To date'); return; }
    applyDateRange(from, to, 'custom');
  });
}

/* ============ SETTINGS DRAWER ============ */
function bindSettings(){
  const backdrop = $('drawer-backdrop');
  const drawer = $('settings-drawer');
  const open = () => { backdrop.classList.add('open'); drawer.classList.add('open'); };
  const close = () => { backdrop.classList.remove('open'); drawer.classList.remove('open'); };

  $('btn-settings').addEventListener('click', () => {
    // Sync UI with current settings
    $('s-autoref').classList.toggle('on', STATE.settings.autoRefresh);
    $('s-interval').value = STATE.settings.refreshIntervalSec;
    $('s-range').value = STATE.settings.defaultDateRange;
    $('s-newtab').classList.toggle('on', STATE.settings.openInNewTab);
    $('s-user').textContent = (window.frappe?.session?.user || window.frappe?.user || '—');
    open();
  });
  $('drawer-close').addEventListener('click', close);
  backdrop.addEventListener('click', close);

  $('s-autoref').addEventListener('click', () => {
    STATE.settings.autoRefresh = !STATE.settings.autoRefresh;
    $('s-autoref').classList.toggle('on', STATE.settings.autoRefresh);
    saveSettings(STATE.settings);
    setupAutoRefresh();
  });
  $('s-newtab').addEventListener('click', () => {
    STATE.settings.openInNewTab = !STATE.settings.openInNewTab;
    $('s-newtab').classList.toggle('on', STATE.settings.openInNewTab);
    saveSettings(STATE.settings);
  });
  $('s-interval').addEventListener('change', () => {
    const v = Math.max(15, Math.min(3600, parseInt($('s-interval').value, 10) || 60));
    STATE.settings.refreshIntervalSec = v;
    $('s-interval').value = v;
    saveSettings(STATE.settings);
    setupAutoRefresh();
  });
  $('s-range').addEventListener('change', () => {
    STATE.settings.defaultDateRange = $('s-range').value;
    saveSettings(STATE.settings);
  });
}

/* ============ GLOBAL SEARCH ============ */
async function runGlobalSearch(q){
  if(!q || q.length < 2){ closeSearchDrop(); return; }
  const drop = $('search-drop');
  drop.innerHTML = '<div class="search-loading">Searching</div>';
  drop.classList.add('open');

  // Search across multiple doctypes in parallel
  const queries = [
    { dt:'Lead',          fields:['name','lead_name','company_name','status'],
      or_filters:[['lead_name','like',`%${q}%`],['company_name','like',`%${q}%`],['name','like',`%${q}%`],['email_id','like',`%${q}%`]] },
    { dt:'Opportunity',   fields:['name','customer_name','party_name','status','sales_stage'],
      or_filters:[['customer_name','like',`%${q}%`],['party_name','like',`%${q}%`],['name','like',`%${q}%`]] },
    { dt:'Customer',      fields:['name','customer_name','customer_type'],
      or_filters:[['customer_name','like',`%${q}%`],['name','like',`%${q}%`]] },
    { dt:'Prospect',      fields:['name','company_name','industry','territory'],
      or_filters:[['company_name','like',`%${q}%`],['name','like',`%${q}%`]] },
    { dt:'Communication', fields:['name','subject','sender','reference_doctype','reference_name'],
      or_filters:[['subject','like',`%${q}%`],['sender','like',`%${q}%`],['recipients','like',`%${q}%`]],
      filters:{'communication_medium':'Email'} }
  ];
  const promises = queries.map(qq =>
    api('frappe.client.get_list', {
      doctype: qq.dt,
      fields: JSON.stringify(qq.fields),
      or_filters: JSON.stringify(qq.or_filters),
      filters: qq.filters ? JSON.stringify(qq.filters) : '[]',
      limit_page_length: 6,
      order_by: 'modified desc'
    }).catch(() => [])
  );
  const results = await Promise.all(promises);
  renderSearchResults(queries.map((qq,i) => ({ dt: qq.dt, rows: results[i] || [] })));
}

function renderSearchResults(groups){
  const drop = $('search-drop');
  const total = groups.reduce((s,g) => s + (g.rows?.length||0), 0);
  if(!total){
    drop.innerHTML = '<div class="search-empty">No matches</div>';
    return;
  }
  let html = '';
  groups.forEach(g => {
    if(!g.rows?.length) return;
    html += `<div class="search-group">
      <div class="search-group-hd">${esc(g.dt)} · ${g.rows.length}</div>`;
    g.rows.forEach(r => {
      let label = '', meta = '';
      if(g.dt === 'Lead'){ label = r.lead_name || r.company_name || r.name; meta = r.status || ''; }
      else if(g.dt === 'Opportunity'){ label = r.customer_name || r.party_name || r.name; meta = `${r.sales_stage||''} ${r.status||''}`.trim(); }
      else if(g.dt === 'Customer'){ label = r.customer_name || r.name; meta = r.customer_type || ''; }
      else if(g.dt === 'Prospect'){ label = r.company_name || r.name; meta = r.industry || r.territory || ''; }
      else if(g.dt === 'Communication'){ label = r.subject || '(no subject)'; meta = r.reference_doctype ? `${r.reference_doctype} · ${r.reference_name||''}` : (r.sender||''); }
      html += `<div class="search-item" data-dt="${esc(g.dt)}" data-name="${esc(r.name)}">
        <span class="si-id">${esc(r.name)}</span>
        <span class="si-name">${esc(label)}</span>
        <span class="si-meta">${esc(meta)}</span>
      </div>`;
    });
    html += `</div>`;
  });
  drop.innerHTML = html;
  drop.querySelectorAll('.search-item').forEach(el => {
    el.addEventListener('click', () => {
      openFrappe(el.dataset.dt, el.dataset.name);
      closeSearchDrop();
    });
  });
}

function closeSearchDrop(){ $('search-drop').classList.remove('open'); }

/* ============ BULK MAIL ACTIONS ============ */
function renderBulkBar(){
  // Inject (or remove) the bulk action bar above the email list
  const existing = document.getElementById('bulk-bar');
  if(existing) existing.remove();
  if(!STATE.selectedMails.size) return;
  const bar = document.createElement('div');
  bar.id = 'bulk-bar';
  bar.className = 'bulk-bar';
  bar.innerHTML = `
    <span class="bulk-count">${STATE.selectedMails.size} selected</span>
    <button class="bulk-btn" data-action="mark-read"><span class="material-symbols-outlined">drafts</span>Mark read</button>
    <button class="bulk-btn" data-action="mark-unread"><span class="material-symbols-outlined">mark_email_unread</span>Mark unread</button>
    <button class="bulk-btn" data-action="star"><span class="material-symbols-outlined">star</span>Star</button>
    <button class="bulk-btn" data-action="unstar"><span class="material-symbols-outlined">star_border</span>Unstar</button>
    <button class="bulk-clear">Clear selection</button>
  `;
  const cardBody = document.querySelector('.main-body .card-body.flush');
  if(cardBody) cardBody.parentElement.parentElement.insertBefore(bar, cardBody.parentElement);
  bar.querySelector('.bulk-clear').addEventListener('click', () => {
    STATE.selectedMails.clear();
    document.querySelectorAll('.mail-row input[type=checkbox]').forEach(c => c.checked = false);
    renderBulkBar();
  });
  bar.querySelectorAll('.bulk-btn').forEach(b => {
    b.addEventListener('click', () => runBulkAction(b.dataset.action));
  });
}

async function runBulkAction(action){
  const names = Array.from(STATE.selectedMails);
  if(!names.length) return;
  const bar = document.getElementById('bulk-bar');
  if(bar) bar.querySelectorAll('button').forEach(b => b.disabled = true);

  try {
    for(const name of names){
      if(action === 'mark-read'){
        await api('frappe.client.set_value', { doctype:'Communication', name, fieldname:'seen', value:1 });
      } else if(action === 'mark-unread'){
        await api('frappe.client.set_value', { doctype:'Communication', name, fieldname:'seen', value:0 });
      } else if(action === 'star' || action === 'unstar'){
        await toggleStar(name, action === 'star');
      }
    }
    STATE.selectedMails.clear();
    await loadAll({silent:true});
    render();
  } catch(err){
    alert('Bulk action failed: ' + err.message);
    if(bar) bar.querySelectorAll('button').forEach(b => b.disabled = false);
  }
}

async function toggleStar(name, makeStarred){
  // Use Frappe's built-in _user_tags field — comma-separated, no schema change
  const current = await api('frappe.client.get_value', {
    doctype:'Communication', filters:JSON.stringify({name}), fieldname:'_user_tags'
  });
  const tagsStr = current?._user_tags || '';
  const tags = new Set(tagsStr.split(',').map(t => t.trim()).filter(Boolean));
  if(makeStarred) tags.add('Starred'); else tags.delete('Starred');
  const newTags = Array.from(tags).join(',');
  await api('frappe.client.set_value', {
    doctype:'Communication', name, fieldname:'_user_tags', value:newTags
  });
  if(makeStarred) STATE.starred.add(name); else STATE.starred.delete(name);
}

/* ============ NEW RECORD MODAL (Lead / Opportunity / Customer / Prospect) ============ */
const NEW_RECORD_FIELDS = {

function openNewRecord(doctype){
  const fields = NEW_RECORD_FIELDS[doctype];
  if(!fields){ alert('Unknown doctype: '+doctype); return; }
  const modal = document.createElement('div');
  modal.className = 'modal-backdrop';
  const inputsHtml = fields.map(f => {
    if(f.type === 'select'){
      return `<div class="field">
        <div class="field-lbl">${esc(f.lbl)}${f.required?' *':''}</div>
        <select id="nr-${f.fld}" style="flex:1;height:30px;border:none;outline:none;font-family:var(--f);font-size:12.5px;background:transparent;color:var(--text);">
          <option value="">Select…</option>
          ${f.options.map(o => `<option value="${esc(o)}">${esc(o)}</option>`).join('')}
        </select>
      </div>`;
    }
    return `<div class="field">
      <div class="field-lbl">${esc(f.lbl)}${f.required?' *':''}</div>
      <input id="nr-${f.fld}" type="${f.type}" placeholder="${esc(f.placeholder||'')}"/>
    </div>`;
  }).join('');

  modal.innerHTML = `
    <div class="modal">
      <div class="modal-hd">
        <span>New ${esc(doctype)}</span>
        <div class="modal-hd-actions">
          <button class="modal-hd-btn" id="nr-close"><span class="material-symbols-outlined">close</span></button>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="modal-body">
        ${inputsHtml}
      </div>
      <div class="modal-foot">
        <button class="send-btn" id="nr-save"><span class="material-symbols-outlined">save</span>Create</button>
        <button class="cancel-btn" id="nr-cancel">Cancel</button>
        <span class="send-status" id="nr-status"></span>
      </div>
    </div>`;
  document.body.appendChild(modal);

  const close = () => modal.remove();
  modal.querySelector('#nr-close').addEventListener('click', close);
  modal.querySelector('#nr-cancel').addEventListener('click', close);
  modal.addEventListener('click', (ev) => { if(ev.target === modal) close(); });

  modal.querySelector('#nr-save').addEventListener('click', async () => {
    const saveBtn = modal.querySelector('#nr-save');
    const status = modal.querySelector('#nr-status');
    const doc = { doctype };
    let missing = '';
    for(const f of fields){
      const el = modal.querySelector('#nr-' + f.fld);
      const v = (el?.value || '').trim();
      if(f.required && !v){ missing = f.lbl; break; }
      if(v) doc[f.fld] = v;
    }
    if(missing){ status.className = 'send-status err'; status.textContent = `${missing} is required`; return; }

    saveBtn.disabled = true;
    status.className = 'send-status';
    status.textContent = 'Creating…';
    try {
      const created = await api('frappe.client.insert', { doc: JSON.stringify(doc) });
      status.className = 'send-status ok';
      status.textContent = '✓ Created ' + (created?.name || '');
      setTimeout(() => {
        close();
        loadAll({silent:true});
        if(created?.name){
          if(STATE.settings.openInNewTab){
            window.open(`/app/${slugify(doctype)}/${encodeURIComponent(created.name)}`, '_blank', 'noopener');
          }
        }
      }, 700);
    } catch(err){
      status.className = 'send-status err';
      status.textContent = 'Failed: ' + err.message.slice(0, 140);
      saveBtn.disabled = false;
    }
  });
  // Focus first input
  setTimeout(() => modal.querySelector('input,select')?.focus(), 50);
}

/* ============ MARK READ ON OPEN ============ */
// Adds best-effort mark-as-read when opening a Received email.
// The actual call is fire-and-forget inside renderThread (already updated).

/* ============ SIDEBAR + BUTTONS WIREUP ============ */
function bindNewRecordButtons(){
  document.querySelectorAll('.nav-add').forEach(btn => {
    btn.addEventListener('click', (ev) => {
      ev.stopPropagation();
      openNewRecord(btn.dataset.new);
    });
  });
}

/* ============ SEARCH INPUT BEHAVIOR ============ */
$('search').addEventListener('input', e => {
  const q = e.target.value.trim();
  STATE.search = q;
  // 1) Inline filter for tables / email lists (instant)
  if(STATE.table || STATE.openMsg){
    if(STATE.openMsg) STATE.openMsg = null;
    render();
  }
  // 2) Debounced global search dropdown (server-side)
  if(STATE.globalSearchTimer) clearTimeout(STATE.globalSearchTimer);
  if(q.length >= 2){
    STATE.globalSearchTimer = setTimeout(() => runGlobalSearch(q), 320);
  } else {
    closeSearchDrop();
  }
});
$('search').addEventListener('focus', () => {
  const q = STATE.search;
  if(q && q.length >= 2 && $('search-drop').innerHTML) $('search-drop').classList.add('open');
});
document.addEventListener('click', (ev) => {
  if(!$('search-drop').contains(ev.target) && ev.target !== $('search')) closeSearchDrop();
});

/* ============ TOP REFRESH BUTTON ============ */
$('btn-refresh').addEventListener('click', () => loadAll());

/* ============ INIT ============ */
bindNav();
bindNewRecordButtons();
bindDateRange();
bindSettings();

// Defer initial load so Frappe's own scripts have set up csrf_token by then
if(document.readyState === 'complete'){
  loadAll().then(setupAutoRefresh);
} else {
  window.addEventListener('load', () => loadAll().then(setupAutoRefresh));
}
</script>
